CountryRecord.description: Per-jurisdiction slice of a family: one entry per matter.

segment.description: Ordered per-family segment: USP, US, US2, PCT, MP, ...
segment.title: Segment

CountryRecord.title: CountryRecord

DocketTaskOut.description: A docket-view row: the task plus the matter/family context views need (M1-R5).
DocketTaskOut.title: DocketTaskOut

FamilyRecordExport.description:
Signed, shareable snapshot (spec §3.1) — the controlled foreign-associate sharing surface
today, the Client Portal substrate (D34) and chain-write path later.

key_id.description: Identifier of the signing key used
key_id.title: Key Id

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 over the canonical record JSON (v1 interim)
signature.title: Signature

FamilyRecordExport.title: FamilyRecordExport

HealthResponse.description: Typed health payload — consumed end-to-end by the SPA to prove the contract loop.
HealthResponse.title: HealthResponse

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Admin Permissions Get
Response Apply Template Api V1 Admin Permissions Apply Template Post
Response Add Grant Api V1 Admin Permissions Grants Post
Response Revoke Grant Api V1 Admin Permissions Grants  User Id   Domain  Delete
Response List Agents Api V1 Agents Get

get.description: The approval queue, RLS-scoped to matters the caller can see.

schema.title: Response List Approvals Api V1 Approvals Get

post.description:
Enqueue a proposed action (agents normally do this via a system worker; exposed here for the
user path + tests). Enforces the agent kill switch + allowed-actions allow-list.
Approve = execute the action via its registered handler, recording the outcome.

get.description: Search the audit trail — filterable by table, row, family, and date range.

schema.title: Response Audit Api V1 Audit Get
Response List Boards Api V1 Boards Get

put.description: Set a custom column value on a work item — validated against the column's type.

post.description:
Create a no-code rule. Validated before storage, so a board never carries a rule that will
throw when it fires.

get.description: The work items this board lenses, derived from its scope (RLS still filters).

schema.title: Response Board Items Api V1 Boards  Board Id  Items Get

get.description: One row per active person with their live load — the board that replaces the Word lists.

schema.title: Response Capacity Board Api V1 Capacity Board Get

get.description: SLA-breach escalations visible to the caller (by matter visibility).

schema.title: Response List Escalations Api V1 Capacity Escalations Get

post.description: Close an escalation once the underlying breach is handled.

get.description: Ranked assignment suggestions for a role, optionally for a specific task type.

schema.title: Response Suggest Api V1 Capacity Suggest Get

post.description:
Drag-to-reassign, logged. A move to an item the caller cannot see is a 404 (RLS renders it
indistinguishable from absent), so the endpoint cannot probe for hidden items.

schema.title: Response List Checks Api V1 Conflicts Get

post.description: Run a conflict check and log it. Returns the ranked matches; an empty list means clear.
Mark a logged check as cleared (a human judged no true conflict).

Generate a matter's maintenance-fee series (M1-R8). Idempotent — returns only the newly
docketed years; already-docketed years are skipped. 404 if the matter is invisible; 422 if the
jurisdiction has no schedule or the matter lacks the required base date.

schema.title: Response Annuities Api V1 Docket Annuities Post

get.description: M1-R14 provenance search — filterable by matter, rule, trigger type, date range.

schema.title: Response Provenance Api V1 Docket Provenance Get

get.description: CSV export of the provenance log (M1-R14) — the WP 1.7 parallel-run diff input.

Docket views (M1-R5): the open docket, filterable by matter/family/assignee/date window.

``status`` defaults to open (pass explicitly for closed history); ``overdue=true`` restricts
to tasks whose earliest live date (respond_by, else final_due_date) is already past.
RLS scopes rows to matters the caller can see — restricted families simply don't appear.

schema.title: Response Docket Tasks Api V1 Docket Tasks Get
Response Trigger Api V1 Docket Trigger Post

get.description:
The caller's own drafts, newest first. Defaults to the pending queue — the discarded ones
are kept for audit (they are evidence the validator fired) but are not daily reading.

schema.title: Response List Drafts Api V1 Drafts Get

get.description:
D45 audit read: proof that redaction ran before each external call, and whether it came
back clean. Counts only — the mapping is never persisted (migration 0015).

schema.title: Response List Redaction Events Api V1 Drafts Redaction Events Get

post.description:
Approve or decline. A draft that is already decided (or belongs to someone else, which RLS
renders indistinguishable from absent) is a 404 — the same answer either way, so the endpoint
cannot be used to probe for other users' drafts.
Move an issue through Identify → Discuss → Solve (or drop it). Enforces the lifecycle.

get.description: The weekly L10 pack, generated from live data.
A person's 1-on-1 report. Defaults to the caller's own.
The current scorecard with each measurable's latest value and RAG colour.

schema.title: Response Scorecard Api V1 Eos Scorecard Get

post.description:
Recompute every auto-populated measurable for the current week. Idempotent — safe to run
nightly and again on demand before a meeting.

get.description: The caller's own To-Do completion against the EOS 90% target.

Ranked passages with citations.

`include_superseded` defaults false — current law unless history is explicitly requested.

schema.title: Response Search Api V1 Kb Search Get

get.description:
The corpus registry with freshness state — the ops answer to "is our grounding current?".

A source registered but never fetched reads as stale, which is the honest answer: an agent
grounding on an empty feed is worse off than one that knows it has nothing.

schema.title: Response List Sources Api V1 Kb Sources Get

get.description: The caller's outstanding requests as assignee — the intra-day queue.

schema.title: Response Mine Api V1 Micro Requests Mine Get
Response Messages Api V1 Micro Requests  Request Id  Messages Get

get.description: The caller's unified, due-ordered queue of open docket tasks + work items (WP 5.5-lite).

schema.title: Response My Day Api V1 My Day Get

post.description: Cross-cite a reference to every matter in a family the caller can see (family-wide OAs).

get.description: The citations view (feeds the 4A.2 matrix + duty dashboard). RLS-scoped by matter.

schema.title: Response List Citations Api V1 Prior Art Citations Get

get.description:
Duty-of-disclosure dashboard (§1.56): counts by citation state + the outstanding
(to_disclose) references for a matter or family. RLS-scoped.

post.description: Cross-link a reference to a matter with a citation state (idempotent on reference+matter).

patch.description: Advance a citation's §1.56 state (to_disclose → disclosed → considered, …).

get.description: Cross-citation matrix for a family: references × matters grid with a state per cell.

schema.title: Response Matrix Api V1 Prior Art Matrix Get

post.description: Add a reference (idempotent on the normalized citation — one row per document).
Draft an editable plan from a description. Creates nothing; the user edits, then launches.
Launch an edited plan into a real chained project.

get.description: Exhausted ladders awaiting an explicit decision — rights-preserving ones first.

schema.title: Response Escalations Api V1 Reminders Escalations Get
Response List Ladders Api V1 Reminders Ladders Get

post.description: Define a ladder. Admin-gated by RLS, and shape-validated before anything is stored.

get.description: Live and historical ladders, optionally for one matter. RLS hides the rest.

schema.title: Response List Schedules Api V1 Reminders Schedules Get

post.description: Log that an instruction arrived. The manual counterpart to A8's reply detection.

get.description: Every rung of one ladder, including the ones withheld and why.

schema.title: Response List Sends Api V1 Reminders Schedules  Schedule Id  Sends Get

post.description: Advance every visible active schedule one tick. Idempotent; `as_of` is for dry-running.

schema.title: Response List Rules Api V1 Rules Get

post.description:
Import an AppColl TaskTypes CSV. Idempotent: a row whose appcoll_task_type_id already
exists updates that rule's v1 definition rather than duplicating (re-runnable, M1-R3).
Imported rules land inactive + draft (except already-inactive superseded-by-a1 rows) so the
engine never fires an unapproved rule; approval is a separate explicit step.

schema.title: Response Unresolved Queue Api V1 Rules Unresolved Get

post.description: Activate the latest version of a draft rule (approval gate, M1-R4). Admin-only via RLS.

Dry-run the rule against a matter (M1-R4): preview generated dates + holiday-roll trace,
persisting nothing. Runs even for draft/inactive rules — that is the whole point of previewing
before activation.

schema.title: Response Simulate Api V1 Rules  Rule Id  Simulate Post

post.description:
Edit a rule = create a new version (append-only, M1-R4). The new version lands draft/
inactive; in-flight tasks keep their generating version. Requires a structurally valid
definition.

get.description:
Failure tags, queryable per matter or per tag (CIPO 500 / scrape error / no data /
download failed) — the legacy Error column, now visible on the matter.

schema.title: Response List Failures Api V1 Watchers Failures Get

get.description: Per-run summaries (rows / new / handled / downloaded / errors) for the ops dashboard.

schema.title: Response List Runs Api V1 Watchers Runs Get
